response.justification: The candidate has extensive software development experience and strong technical skills, including C and embedded systems work, but lacks direct experience with Linux kernel modification, network security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and embedded networking products. Native-level Japanese proficiency is also unconfirmed.
strengths: Strong C programming experience for embedded systems (e.g., National Instruments LabWindows/CVI, robotic arms).
Proven track record in full-stack and systems programming across multiple languages (C, C++, D, JavaScript, TypeScript).
Experience with Linux and embedded development environments (Docker, CI/CD, dev-ops tooling).
concerns: No explicit experience with Linux kernel modification or security-related kernel work.
Limited exposure to networking security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X) or embedded networking products.
Native-level Japanese proficiency is not mentioned in the resume.
